title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Jungle Lodges Karnataka

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Jungle Lodges Karnataka
jsonLd.description:
We at Jungle Lodges Karnataka are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
